comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat, here's a bunch of fixes for some reports of golangci-lint. Feel free to cherry-pick the commits in case the PR won't make it in before my PTO.
@vrothberg What is the scoop on this PR?

> @vrothberg What is the scoop on this PR?

I can continue once I'm back from PTO. Currently just browsing through GitHub recovering from hiking :^)
Enjoy your last few minutes of Vacation...  :^)

> Enjoy your last few minutes of Vacation... :^)

Thanks :) Still one week to go though :surfing_man:
Ok make sure you don't get lost in the woods.
